{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323052921729B73057A75F9217161\"}"},"total":28},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600011569908826942","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"条理清晰新鲜吸引人相看给五星好评！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769517582,"group_id":"7588586551194438681","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4x6o3jRJ66Vp0Zy8VzHuMCeKVd9tlDmtg5H5YR03DXO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788850\u0026x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"3755552071750152","user_name":"龙谷的莎尔拉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3755552071750152","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1641685001,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588586551194438681","book_info":{"abstract":"【都市脑洞+系统+国民女神+奶爸+萌娃+单女主+日常温馨】一觉醒来，外卖员陈浩成了顶流国民女神林采薇女儿的爸，附带一个“奶爸成神系统”。带娃=涨技能=赚大钱？还有这种好事！于是，他教女儿折的纸鹤能飞，画的涂鸦卖出天价，随口哼的歌血洗音乐榜，连讲的睡前故事都出版成畅销童书。曾经的同事惊叹：“浩子，你送外卖是体验生活吧？”对手嘲讽：“一个靠女人的软饭男。”直到金融峰会，股神称他为“老师”；格斗赛场，冠军尊他为“前辈”；国际画展，他的作品被摆在中央……全球都在猜这位横空出世的全能天才究竟是谁。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ec979d4868f4e8b1ffb975bc96d769d0","author":"极地
